name: ITU AbsorbTech
message: ITU AbsorbTech has provided industrial services in support of cleaner, safer and more productive work environments since 1930. ITU AbsorbTech's sustainable solutions include reusable and professionally laundered absorbents, towels, mops, floor mats and cotton roll towels. ITU AbsorbTech, Inc. is a family-owned and operated company with 13 locations throughout the eastern half of the United States.
